# Formosaic -- Full Reference

> A config-driven React form library with a built-in declarative rules engine. Define forms as JSON (`IFormConfig`), swap UI libraries without rewriting logic, and let the engine handle conditional visibility, computed values, validation, and auto-save. 12 UI adapters (Fluent UI, MUI, Ant Design, Mantine, Chakra, Radix, React Aria, headless HTML, and more), a visual drag-and-drop form builder, and 4,700+ tests. MIT licensed. Built on react-hook-form v7.

This is the extended reference for AI models. For the concise version, see [llms.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/llms.txt).

## Architecture

### Rendering Pipeline

```
IFormConfig (v2)
  -> FormEngine (form state via react-hook-form, save with AbortController/retry)
    -> evaluateAllRules() -> IRuntimeFormState
    -> FormFields (ordered field list)
      -> FormErrorBoundary (per-field crash isolation)
        -> RenderField (per field, useMemo for component resolution)
          -> Looks up injectedFields[type] from context
          -> Controller (react-hook-form integration, unified validation)
          -> FieldWrapper (label, error, status chrome, render props for theming)
            -> React.cloneElement(InjectedFieldComponent, IFieldProps)
```

### Provider Hierarchy

Two React context providers must wrap the form tree (both memoized via useMemo):

```
<RulesEngineProvider>          -- Owns rule state via useReducer (memoized context value)
  <InjectedFieldProvider>      -- Component injection registry (memoized context value)
    <FormEngine>              -- Entry point
```

### Component Injection System

Fields are registered as a `Record<string, JSX.Element>` via `InjectedFieldProvider`. `RenderField` looks up the component by `type` string key and uses `React.cloneElement()` to pass standardized `IFieldProps`. Consumers can override any built-in field or add custom ones.

## Rules Engine (v2)

Rules are **declarative** -- defined as `IRule[]` on each field config with rich conditions and effects.

### Condition Operators (20)

`equals`, `notEquals`, `greaterThan`, `lessThan`, `greaterThanOrEqual`, `lessThanOrEqual`, `contains`, `notContains`, `startsWith`, `endsWith`, `in`, `notIn`, `isEmpty`, `isNotEmpty`, `matches`, `arrayContains`, `arrayNotContains`, `arrayLengthEquals`, `arrayLengthGreaterThan`, `arrayLengthLessThan`

### Logical Operators

`and`, `or`, `not` (composable condition trees)

### Lifecycle

1. **Init**: `IFormConfig` + entity data -> `evaluateAllRules()` -> builds dependency graph via topological sort + evaluates all rules
2. **Validate**: `validateDependencyGraph()` checks for circular/self dependencies via Kahn's algorithm
3. **Trigger**: Field value change -> `processFieldChange()`
4. **Evaluate**: `evaluateAffectedFields()` -- only re-evaluates transitively affected fields (incremental)
5. **Resolve**: Priority-based conflict resolution (higher priority rule wins)
6. **Apply**: Dispatch to reducer -> React re-render -> fields read updated `IRuntimeFieldState`

### Rule Effects

- Required/Hidden/ReadOnly toggle
- Component type swap
- Validation rule replacement
- Computed value expressions ($values.field, $fn.name(), $parent.field)
- Dropdown option filtering/replacement
- Field ordering
- Cross-field effects (one rule can affect multiple fields)
- Conditional validation (validate only when condition met)
- Confirm input modal trigger
- setValue (set a field's value directly)

## Configuration Schema

### Key Types

```typescript
interface IFormConfig {
  version: 2;
  fields: Record<string, IFieldConfig>;
  fieldOrder?: string[];
  wizard?: IWizardConfig;
  settings?: IFormSettings;
}

interface IFieldConfig {
  type: string;            // "Textbox", "Dropdown", "Toggle", etc.
  label: string;
  required?: boolean;
  hidden?: boolean;
  readOnly?: boolean;
  defaultValue?: unknown;
  computedValue?: string;  // "$values.qty * $values.price" or "$fn.setDate()"
  options?: IOption[];      // { value, label, disabled?, group?, icon?, color? }
  validate?: IValidationRule[];  // { name, params?, message?, async?, debounceMs?, when? }
  rules?: IRule[];          // { when: ICondition, then: IFieldEffect, else?, priority? }
  items?: Record<string, IFieldConfig>;  // field array items (full config)
  config?: Record<string, unknown>;      // arbitrary metadata for field component
}

type ICondition = IFieldCondition | ILogicalCondition;
// IFieldCondition: { field, operator, value? }
// ILogicalCondition: { operator: "and"|"or"|"not", conditions: ICondition[] }
```

## Pluggable Registries

- `ValidationRegistry` -- Unified `ValidatorFn` for sync, async, and cross-field validation. 14 built-in validators + `registerValidators()` for custom. Per-rule `when` condition, `debounceMs`, `async` flag.
- `ValueFunctionRegistry` -- Value functions via `$fn.name()` syntax in computed expressions. `registerValueFunctions()` for custom.
- `LocaleRegistry` -- i18n support via `registerLocale()` with partial overrides and English fallback
- `formStateSerialization` -- Date-safe JSON round-trip for draft persistence
- `rjsf/` -- RJSF-compatible schema import: `fromRjsfSchema()` converts JSON Schema + uiSchema + formData to `IFormConfig` with auto-generated `IRule[]` from dependencies/if-then-else/oneOf. `toRjsfSchema()` for reverse export.
- `zodSchemaImport` -- Convert Zod schema to `Record<string, IFieldConfig>` (no zod dependency)
- `lazyFieldRegistry` -- Create field registries with React.lazy for on-demand loading

## Comparison Summary

| Feature | Formosaic | RJSF | TanStack Form | Formik | uniforms |
|---------|:-----------:|:----:|:-------------:|:------:|:--------:|
| Config-driven | Yes | Yes | No | No | Yes |
| Declarative rules engine | Yes (20 ops) | Partial | No | No | No |
| UI adapter system | 12 adapters | 5 themes | Headless | N/A | 6 bridges |
| Computed values | `$values`, `$fn` | No | No | No | No |
| Wizard / multi-step | Built-in | Add-on | Manual | Manual | No |
| Visual form builder | Yes (MIT) | No | No | No | No |
| Bundle (core) | ~114 KB | ~85 KB | ~12 KB | ~13 KB | ~45 KB |

See [docs/comparison.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/comparison.md) for full comparison with migration paths.

## Package API Reference

### @formosaic/core

UI-library agnostic engine built for React. Depends only on `react` and `react-hook-form`.

- **Providers**: `RulesEngineProvider`, `InjectedFieldProvider` -- React context providers that must wrap the form tree (memoized)
- **Components**: `FormEngine` (entry point, save with AbortController/retry/timeout), `FormFields`, `RenderField` (useMemo, async validation wired), `FieldWrapper` (React.memo, render props for theming), `ConfirmInputsModal` (focus trap), `WizardForm` (multi-step wizard, step announcements), `FieldArray` (repeating sections), `FormErrorBoundary` (per-field crash isolation), `FormDevTools` (dev-only debugging panel with Rules, Values, Errors, Graph, Perf, Deps, Timeline tabs)
- **Rules Engine**: `buildDependencyGraph`, `evaluateAllRules`, `evaluateAffectedFields`, `processFieldChange`, `topologicalSort`, `evaluateCondition` (20 operators + AND/OR/NOT), priority-based conflict resolution. Rule effects: required, hidden, readOnly, component swap, options, validate, computedValue, setValue, fieldOrder. Array operators: `arrayContains`, `arrayNotContains`, `arrayLength`.
- **Validation**: 14 built-in validators + `registerValidators()` for custom sync/async/cross-field. Per-rule `when` condition, `debounceMs`, `async` flag. Factory functions: `createMinLengthValidation`, `createMaxLengthValidation`, `createNumericRangeValidation`, `createPatternValidation`, `createRequiredIfValidation`. `registerValidatorMetadata()` for attaching label/description/paramSchema to validators.
- **Config Validation**: `validateFieldConfigs()` -- dev-mode checks for missing deps, unregistered components/validators, circular deps
- **Cycle Detection**: `validateDependencyGraph()` -- Kahn's algorithm on dependency graphs
- **i18n**: `registerLocale()`, `getLocaleString()`, `resetLocale()` -- partial locale overrides with English fallback
- **Wizard**: `getVisibleSteps()`, `getStepFields()`, `validateStepFields()`, `isStepValid()`, `getStepIndex()`
- **Registries**: `registerValidators()` (unified sync+async), `registerValueFunctions()` -- plug in custom functions by name
- **Hooks**: `useDraftPersistence()` (auto-save to localStorage, recover on mount), `useBeforeUnload()` (browser warning on unsaved changes), `useFormAnalytics()` (analytics callback wrapper)
- **Serialization**: `serializeFormState()`, `deserializeFormState()` -- Date-safe JSON round-trip
- **Schema Import**: `jsonSchemaToFieldConfig()` -- convert JSON Schema to `Record<string, IFieldConfig>`
- **Zod Import**: `zodSchemaToFieldConfig()` -- convert Zod object schemas to `Record<string, IFieldConfig>` (no zod dependency). Maps ZodString->Textbox, ZodNumber->Number, ZodBoolean->Toggle, ZodEnum->Dropdown, ZodDate->DateControl, ZodArray->Multiselect
- **Type Safety**: `defineFormConfig()` -- zero-cost TypeScript utility for type-safe form configs
- **JSON Schemas**: `schemas/field-config.schema.json` and `schemas/wizard-config.schema.json` for IDE autocompletion
- **Lazy Loading**: `createLazyFieldRegistry()` -- React.lazy field registry for code splitting
- **Theming**: CSS custom properties (`--fe-error-color`, etc.) via optional `styles.css`, render props on `FieldWrapper`
- **Accessibility**: Focus trap in modals, focus-to-first-error, ARIA live regions, wizard step announcements
- **Analytics**: `IAnalyticsCallbacks` (8 event hooks), `useFormAnalytics()` hook
- **Performance**: `RenderTracker` (per-field render count tracking), `EventTimeline` (chronological event log)
- **Types**: `IFormConfig`, `IFieldConfig`, `IRule`, `ICondition`, `IFieldCondition`, `ILogicalCondition`, `IFieldEffect`, `IFieldProps<T>`, `IOption`, `IValidationRule`, `IRuntimeFieldState`, `IRuntimeFormState`, `IRulesEngineState`, `IRulesEngineAction`, `IWizardConfig`, `IAnalyticsCallbacks`, `ICoreLocaleStrings`, `ComponentTypes`

### @formosaic/fluent

Fluent UI v9 adapter. Provides 28 field components (22 editable + 6 read-only).

- **Registry**: `createFluentFieldRegistry()` -- returns a complete field map for `InjectedFieldProvider`
- **Editable Fields**: Textbox, Dropdown, Toggle, Number, MultiSelect, DateControl, Slider, SimpleDropdown, MultiSelectSearch, Textarea, DocumentLinks, StatusDropdown, DynamicFragment, RadioGroup, CheckboxGroup, Rating, ColorPicker, Autocomplete, FileUpload, DateRange, DateTime, PhoneInput
- **Read-Only Fields**: ReadOnly, ReadOnlyArray, ReadOnlyDateTime, ReadOnlyCumulativeNumber, ReadOnlyRichText, ReadOnlyWithButton

### @formosaic/mui

Material UI (MUI) adapter. Provides 28 field components (22 editable + 6 read-only).

- **Registry**: `createMuiFieldRegistry()` -- returns a complete field map for `InjectedFieldProvider`
- **Editable Fields**: Same 22 types as fluent adapter, using @mui/material components
- **Read-Only Fields**: Same 6 types as fluent adapter

### @formosaic/headless

Unstyled semantic HTML adapter. No UI framework dependency. Provides 28 field components (22 editable + 6 read-only) using plain HTML elements with data-* attributes and ARIA roles.

- **Registry**: `createHeadlessFieldRegistry()` -- returns a complete field map for `InjectedFieldProvider`
- **Editable Fields**: Same 22 types, semantic HTML elements
- **Read-Only Fields**: Same 6 types
- **Optional CSS**: `styles.css` with CSS custom properties for basic styling

### @formosaic/antd
Ant Design v5 adapter. Provides 28 field components (19 native antd + 9 semantic HTML). Native Tier 2: Rate, AutoComplete, DatePicker+showTime, RangePicker, Upload, ColorPicker.
- **Registry**: `createAntdFieldRegistry()`

### @formosaic/chakra
Chakra UI v3 adapter. Provides 28 field components (7 native Chakra + 21 semantic HTML fallbacks due to Ark UI DTS issues).
- **Registry**: `createChakraFieldRegistry()`

### @formosaic/mantine
Mantine v7 adapter. Provides 28 field components (18 native Mantine + 10 semantic HTML). Native Tier 2: Rating, Autocomplete, DateTimePicker, FileInput, ColorInput.
- **Registry**: `createMantineFieldRegistry()`

### @formosaic/atlaskit
Atlassian Design System adapter. Provides 28 field components using semantic HTML.
- **Registry**: `createAtlaskitFieldRegistry()`

### @formosaic/base-web
Uber Base Web adapter. Provides 28 field components (10 native baseui + 18 semantic HTML).
- **Registry**: `createBaseWebFieldRegistry()`

### @formosaic/heroui
HeroUI (formerly NextUI) adapter. Provides 28 field components using semantic HTML.
- **Registry**: `createHeroUIFieldRegistry()`

### @formosaic/radix
Radix UI primitives adapter. Provides 28 field components (6 Radix UI native + 22 semantic HTML). Ships with no styles, ideal for Tailwind/shadcn. No provider wrapper needed.
- **Registry**: `createRadixFieldRegistry()`

### @formosaic/react-aria
React Aria Components adapter. Provides 28 field components (11 React Aria native + 17 semantic HTML). Native Tier 2: ComboBox for Autocomplete. Best-in-class ARIA accessibility. No provider wrapper needed.
- **Registry**: `createReactAriaFieldRegistry()`

### @formosaic/examples

Three example applications demonstrating common form patterns.

- **login-mfa**: Conditional MFA fields, dynamic labels
- **checkout**: Wizard form, dropdown dependencies, payment branching
- **data-entry**: Field arrays, computed values, cross-field validation

## Code Examples

### Minimal Setup (Fluent UI)

```tsx
import { RulesEngineProvider, InjectedFieldProvider, UseInjectedFieldContext, FormEngine } from "@formosaic/core";
import { createFluentFieldRegistry } from "@formosaic/fluent";

function FieldRegistrar({ children }) {
  const { setInjectedFields } = UseInjectedFieldContext();
  useEffect(() => setInjectedFields(createFluentFieldRegistry()), []);
  return <>{children}</>;
}

const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    name: { type: "Textbox", label: "Name", required: true },
  },
  fieldOrder: ["name"],
};

<RulesEngineProvider>
  <InjectedFieldProvider>
    <FieldRegistrar>
      <FormEngine
        configName="myForm"
        programName="myApp"
        formConfig={formConfig}
        defaultValues={{ name: "" }}
        saveData={async (data) => data}
      />
    </FieldRegistrar>
  </InjectedFieldProvider>
</RulesEngineProvider>
```

### Swap to MUI (one import change)

```tsx
import { createMuiFieldRegistry } from "@formosaic/mui";
setInjectedFields(createMuiFieldRegistry()); // that's it
```

### Swap to Headless (one import change)

```tsx
import { createHeadlessFieldRegistry } from "@formosaic/headless";
setInjectedFields(createHeadlessFieldRegistry()); // that's it
```

### Rules Engine (v2 Declarative Rules)

```tsx
const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    type: {
      type: "Dropdown",
      label: "Type",
      options: [
        { value: "bug", label: "Bug" },
        { value: "feature", label: "Feature" },
      ],
    },
    severity: {
      type: "Dropdown",
      label: "Severity",
      hidden: true,
      rules: [
        {
          when: { field: "type", operator: "equals", value: "bug" },
          then: { required: true, hidden: false },
          else: { hidden: true },
          priority: 1,
        },
      ],
    },
  },
  fieldOrder: ["type", "severity"],
};
```

### Compound Conditions

```tsx
rules: [
  {
    when: {
      operator: "and",
      conditions: [
        { field: "type", operator: "equals", value: "bug" },
        { field: "priority", operator: "greaterThanOrEqual", value: 3 },
      ],
    },
    then: { assignee: { required: true } },
  },
]
```

### Computed Values

```tsx
fields: {
  qty: { type: "Number", label: "Quantity" },
  price: { type: "Number", label: "Unit Price" },
  total: {
    type: "ReadOnly",
    label: "Total",
    computedValue: "$values.qty * $values.price",
  },
  createdDate: {
    type: "ReadOnly",
    label: "Created",
    computedValue: "$fn.setDate()",
  },
}
```

### Validation (Unified Registry)

```tsx
import { registerValidators } from "@formosaic/core";

registerValidators({
  CheckUniqueEmail: {
    fn: async (value, entityData, signal) => {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/check?email=${value}`, { signal });
      const { exists } = await res.json();
      return exists ? "Already in use" : undefined;
    },
    async: true,
  },
});

// In field config: validate: [{ name: "CheckUniqueEmail", async: true, debounceMs: 500 }]
```

### i18n

```tsx
import { registerLocale } from "@formosaic/core";
registerLocale({ required: "Obligatoire", save: "Sauvegarder" });
```

### Wizard

```tsx
import { WizardForm } from "@formosaic/core";

const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: { /* ... */ },
  wizard: {
    steps: [
      { id: "basics", title: "Basics", fields: ["name", "type"] },
      {
        id: "details",
        title: "Details",
        fields: ["description"],
        visibleWhen: { field: "type", operator: "equals", value: "bug" },
      },
    ],
    validateOnStepChange: true,
  },
};

<WizardForm
  formConfig={formConfig}
  entityData={formValues}
  renderStepContent={(fields) => <FieldRenderer fields={fields} />}
  renderStepNavigation={({ goNext, goPrev, canGoNext, canGoPrev }) => (
    <nav>
      <button onClick={goPrev} disabled={!canGoPrev}>Back</button>
      <button onClick={goNext} disabled={!canGoNext}>Next</button>
    </nav>
  )}
/>
```

### Analytics

```tsx
import { useFormAnalytics, IAnalyticsCallbacks } from "@formosaic/core";

const analytics: IAnalyticsCallbacks = {
  onFieldChange: (fieldName, oldValue, newValue) => track("field_change", { fieldName }),
  onSaveStart: () => track("save_start"),
  onSaveSuccess: (duration) => track("save_success", { duration }),
  onSaveError: (error) => track("save_error", { error: error.message }),
  onRuleEvaluated: (rule, result) => track("rule_evaluated", { rule: rule.id }),
  onValidationError: (fieldName, errors) => track("validation_error", { fieldName }),
  onStepChange: (fromStep, toStep) => track("step_change", { fromStep, toStep }),
  onFormMount: (config) => track("form_mount", { config: config.configName }),
};

const formAnalytics = useFormAnalytics(analytics);
```

### RJSF Schema Import

```tsx
import { fromRjsfSchema } from "@formosaic/core";

const schema = {
  type: "object",
  properties: {
    name: { type: "string", title: "Name" },
    role: { type: "string", enum: ["admin", "user"] },
  },
  dependencies: {
    role: {
      oneOf: [
        {
          properties: { role: { const: "admin" }, adminCode: { type: "string", title: "Admin Code" } },
          required: ["adminCode"],
        },
      ],
    },
  },
};

// dependencies become IRule[] automatically
const formConfig = fromRjsfSchema(schema, uiSchema, existingFormData);
```

### Zod Schema Import

```tsx
import { zodSchemaToFieldConfig } from "@formosaic/core";
import { z } from "zod";

const UserSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().min(1),
  age: z.number().min(0),
  active: z.boolean(),
  role: z.enum(["admin", "user", "guest"]),
});

const fieldConfigs = zodSchemaToFieldConfig(UserSchema);
// ZodString->Textbox, ZodNumber->Number, ZodBoolean->Toggle, ZodEnum->Dropdown
```

### Lazy Field Registry

```tsx
import { createLazyFieldRegistry } from "@formosaic/core";

const lazyFields = createLazyFieldRegistry({
  Textbox: () => import("./fields/HookTextbox"),
  Dropdown: () => import("./fields/HookDropdown"),
});

<InjectedFieldProvider injectedFields={lazyFields}>
```

## Available Field Types

22 editable + 6 read-only field types. All 28 are available across all 11 adapters (fluent, mui, headless, antd, chakra, mantine, atlaskit, base-web, heroui, radix, react-aria). 4 additional specialized types (PopOutEditor, ChoiceSet, FieldArray, RichText) are fluent/mui/headless only.

### Editable Fields

| Component Key | Description |
|---------------|-------------|
| `Textbox` | Single-line text input |
| `Number` | Numeric input with validation |
| `Toggle` | Boolean toggle switch |
| `Dropdown` | Single-select dropdown |
| `Multiselect` | Multi-select dropdown |
| `DateControl` | Date picker with clear button |
| `Slider` | Numeric slider |
| `SimpleDropdown` | Dropdown from string array in config |
| `MultiSelectSearch` | Searchable multi-select |
| `Textarea` | Multiline text with expand-to-modal |
| `DocumentLinks` | URL link CRUD |
| `StatusDropdown` | Dropdown with color status indicator |
| `DynamicFragment` | Hidden field (form state only) |
| `RadioGroup` | Single-select radio button group |
| `CheckboxGroup` | Multi-select checkbox group (value: `string[]`) |
| `Rating` | Star rating input (configurable `max`, `allowHalf`) |
| `ColorPicker` | Native color picker returning hex string |
| `Autocomplete` | Searchable single-select with type-ahead |
| `FileUpload` | File picker (single or multiple) |
| `DateRange` | Two date inputs (From / To) |
| `DateTime` | Combined date+time input |
| `PhoneInput` | Phone input with inline masking |

### Read-Only Fields

| Component Key | Description |
|---------------|-------------|
| `ReadOnly` | Plain text display |
| `ReadOnlyArray` | Array of strings |
| `ReadOnlyDateTime` | Formatted date/time |
| `ReadOnlyCumulativeNumber` | Computed sum of other fields |
| `ReadOnlyRichText` | Rendered HTML |
| `ReadOnlyWithButton` | Text with action button |

## Docs

- [README.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/README.md): Full usage guide with quick start, field types, architecture, and examples
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): Detailed architecture, rendering pipeline, key directories, coding conventions
- [docs/comparison.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/comparison.md): Comparison vs RJSF, TanStack Form, Formik, uniforms, SurveyJS, Form.io
- [docs/choosing-an-adapter.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/choosing-an-adapter.md): Adapter recommendation guide
- [docs/creating-an-adapter.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/creating-an-adapter.md): Guide for building custom UI library adapters
- [docs/field-config-reference.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/field-config-reference.md): IFieldConfig v2 reference
- [docs/rules-engine.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/rules-engine.md): Rules engine lifecycle, dependency graph, evaluation
- [docs/condition-operators.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/condition-operators.md): All 20 condition operators
- [docs/expression-syntax.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/expression-syntax.md): Expression syntax ($values, $fn, $parent)
- [docs/ACCESSIBILITY.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/ACCESSIBILITY.md): Accessibility guide (ARIA, keyboard, screen readers)
- [docs/ssr-guide.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/ssr-guide.md): Server-side rendering guide
- [docs/shadcn-integration.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/shadcn-integration.md): shadcn/ui integration guide
- [docs/analytics-telemetry.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/analytics-telemetry.md): Analytics and telemetry integration
- [docs/performance-debugging.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/performance-debugging.md): Performance debugging with DevTools
- [docs/adapter-architecture.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/adapter-architecture.md): Adapter classification and architecture
- [docs/canonical-field-contracts.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/canonical-field-contracts.md): Canonical field behavior contracts
- [docs/parity-matrix.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/parity-matrix.md): Per-field, per-adapter parity matrix
- [docs/api-stability.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/api-stability.md): Public API stability classification
- [docs/divergence-register.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/blob/main/docs/divergence-register.md): Cross-adapter divergence register
